creator: michael@neese-web.de
text:
Created attachment 188556
ifconfig

Hello,

on our two systems, bpdu frames (spanning-tree) are ignored. We can't even see them with a tcpdump.
We're running two pfsense firewalls in version 2.4.2 (freebsd 11.1-Release-p4) as HA and in bridge mode. Because the pfsense systems ignore the bpdu frames, both think they are the root bridge.
If we boot a linux live system, everything is ok. We can also see them in tcpdump.
tcpdump command used: tcpdump -i ixl1 -vvv -n stp

We also investigatet the problem with a pfsense gold partner and they ment, we should report it upstream.

Used NICs:
ixl0@pci0:5:0:0:        class=0x020000 card=0x00068086 chip=0x15728086 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'Ethernet Controller X710 for 10GbE SFP+'
    class      = network

Switch: WS-C3850-24XS
Switch Firmware: 16.3.3
